title: KSPACK
description: This pack is used for the KS datapacks and servers
body:
This pack is used by the KS datapacks and servers to add features and enhance their visual coherence within the game.


datapacks supported:

- KS Enchantments : https://modrinth.com/datapack/ks-enchantments

- Tiered Shields : https://modrinth.com/datapack/ks-shields

- More Mounts and Mayhem : https://modrinth.com/datapack/more-mounts-and-mayhem

- Sword Armor Trims : https://modrinth.com/datapack/sword-trims
- Elytra Armor Trims : https://modrinth.com/datapack/ks-elytra-trims
- Axe Armor trims : https://modrinth.com/datapack/axe-trims
- Pickaxe Armor Trims : https://modrinth.com/datapack/pickaxe-trims
- Shovel Armor Trims : https://modrinth.com/datapack/shovel-trims
